display.purpose: Hero page heading. Once per page.

title.purpose: Article card titles, truncated to one line.

body.purpose: Page copy and article content. 65ch max.

label.purpose: Metadata: dates, categories, badges, reading time.

shadows.name: card-hover
shadows.purpose: Article card hover state. Subtle lift.

shadows.name: template-card-hover
shadows.purpose: Template showcase card hover. Deeper than card-hover.

shadows.name: dropdown
shadows.purpose: Locale switcher dropdown and overlay menus.

motion.name: state-transition
motion.purpose: Default easing for state transitions: hover, focus, active.

motion.name: card-shift
motion.purpose: Article card horizontal shift on hover.

components.name: Subscribe Button
components.description: Primary call-to-action. Used for the newsletter subscribe form.
components.css: .ds-btn-subscribe { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; padding: 0.625rem 1.5rem; background: var(--color-accent-ui, #c2571a); color: #fff; border: none; border-radius: 9999px; font-family: var(--font-ui, Inter, sans-serif); font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 600; line-height: 1; cursor: pointer; white-space: nowrap; transition: background 0.15s ease, transform 0.15s ease; } .ds-btn-subscribe:hover { background: var(--color-accent-light, #da702c); transform: scale(1.02); } .ds-btn-subscribe:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px rgba(194, 87, 26, 0.1); }

components.name: Subscribe Input
components.description: Email input for the newsletter subscribe form.
components.css: .ds-input-subscribe { flex: 1; padding: 0.625rem 1rem; border: 1px solid var(--border-color, #e8e0d4); border-radius: 9999px; background: var(--bg-card, #ffffff); font-family: var(--font-ui, Inter, sans-serif); font-size: 0.875rem; color: var(--text-body, #1c1814); outline: none; transition: border-color 0.15s ease; } .ds-input-subscribe::placeholder { color: var(--text-faint, #6b6356); } .ds-input-subscribe:focus { border-color: var(--color-accent-ui, #c2571a); box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px rgba(194, 87, 26, 0.1); }

components.name: Article Card
components.description: Blog post listing card on the homepage. Numbered, with metadata and truncated excerpt.

components.css: .ds-card-article { display: flex; align-items: flex-start; gap: 1.25rem; padding: 1.25rem; border-radius: 12px; background: var(--bg-card, #ffffff); border: 1px solid var(--border-color, #e8e0d4); text-decoration: none; transition: all 0.2s ease; } .ds-card-article:hover { transform: translateX(4px); box-shadow: 0 4px 20px rgba(0,0,0,0.06); border-color: var(--color-accent-ui, #c2571a); } .ds-card-number { font-family: var(--font-editorial-heading, 'Playfair Display', Georgia, serif); font-size: 1.5rem; font-weight: 600; color: var(--text-faint, #6b6356); line-height: 1; min-width: 2.5rem; padding-top: 0.1rem; opacity: 0.5; } .ds-card-body { flex: 1; min-width: 0; } .ds-card-meta { display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; align-items: center; gap: 0.5rem; margin-bottom: 0.25rem; } .ds-card-date { font-size: 0.7rem; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.06em; color: var(--text-muted, #5c5548); } .ds-card-chip { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; border-radius: 9999px; padding: 0.15rem 0.6rem; font-size: 0.7rem; font-weight: 600; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.05em; line-height: 1.4; } .ds-chip-guide { background: #f0fdf4; color: #15803d; } .ds-card-diff { font-size: 0.7rem; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.05em; color: var(--text-faint, #6b6356); } .ds-card-read { font-size: 0.7rem; color: var(--text-faint, #6b6356); } .ds-card-title { font-family: var(--font-editorial-heading, 'Playfair Display', Georgia, serif); font-size: 1rem; font-weight: 600; line-height: 1.3; color: var(--text-heading, #1c1814); margin: 0 0 0.25rem; overflow: hidden; text-overflow: ellipsis; white-space: nowrap; } .ds-card-desc { font-size: 0.875rem; line-height: 1.5; color: var(--text-muted, #5c5548); margin: 0; display: -webkit-box; -webkit-line-clamp: 2; -webkit-box-orient: vertical; overflow: hidden; }

components.name: Category Chip
components.description: Semantic post category label. Color-coded by type.
components.css: .ds-chip { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; border-radius: 9999px; padding: 0.15rem 0.6rem; font-size: 0.7rem; font-weight: 600; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.05em; line-height: 1.4; } .ds-chip-ai-tools { background: #eff6ff; color: #1d4ed8; } .ds-chip-guide { background: #f0fdf4; color: #15803d; } .ds-chip-review { background: #fffbeb; color: #b45309; } .ds-chip-default { background: #f5f3f0; color: #5c5548; }

components.name: Navigation Header
components.description: Sticky top navigation bar with glass blur, site title, links, search, locale switcher, and GitHub icon.
components.css: .ds-header { position: sticky; top: 0; z-index: 50; background: rgba(250,250,250,0.85); backdrop-filter: blur(12px); -webkit-backdrop-filter: blur(12px); border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border-color, #e8e0d4); } .ds-nav { display: flex; align-items: center; max-width: 1400px; margin: 0 auto; padding: 0.75rem 2rem; } .ds-nav-brand { font-family: var(--font-editorial-heading, 'Playfair Display', Georgia, serif); font-size: 1.125rem; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: -0.02em; color: var(--text-heading, #1c1814); text-decoration: none; white-space: nowrap; } .ds-nav-brand:hover { color: var(--color-accent-ui, #c2571a); } .ds-nav-links { display: flex; flex: 1; align-items: center; justify-content: flex-end; gap: 1.25rem; } .ds-nav-link { font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; color: var(--text-muted, #5c5548); text-decoration: none; transition: color 0.15s ease; } .ds-nav-link:hover { color: var(--color-accent-ui, #c2571a); text-decoration: underline; } .ds-nav-search { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; background: none; border: none; color: var(--text-faint, #6b6356); cursor: pointer; padding: 0; transition: color 0.15s ease; } .ds-nav-search:hover { color: var(--text-body, #1c1814); } .ds-nav-divider { width: 1px; height: 1.25rem; background: var(--border-color, #e8e0d4); margin-left: 0.5rem; } .ds-nav-locale { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.25rem; padding: 0.25rem 0.5rem; border: 1px solid var(--border-color, #e8e0d4); border-radius: 0.375rem; background: none; font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 600; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.05em; color: var(--text-muted, #5c5548); cursor: pointer; transition: color 0.15s ease; } .ds-nav-locale:hover { color: var(--text-body, #1c1814); } .ds-nav-icon { display: flex; align-items: center; color: var(--text-faint, #6b6356); transition: color 0.15s ease; } .ds-nav-icon:hover { color: var(--text-body, #1c1814); }

components.css: .ds-article-header { background: var(--bg-header, #f5f0e4); } .ds-article-inner { max-width: 880px; margin: 0 auto; padding: 3rem 1.5rem; } .ds-article-meta { display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; align-items: center; gap: 0.5rem; margin-bottom: 0.75rem; font-size: 0.82em; color: var(--text-muted, #5c5548); text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.06em; } .ds-article-meta-item { font-size: 0.82em; color: var(--text-muted, #5c5548); } .ds-article-chip { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; border-radius: 9999px; padding: 0.25rem 0.625rem; background: rgba(194,87,26,0.1); font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 500; color: var(--color-accent-ui, #c2571a); } .ds-article-template { margin-left: auto; display: inline-flex; align-items: center; border-radius: 9999px; padding: 0.25rem 0.625rem; border: 1px solid var(--border-color, #e8e0d4); font-size: 0.75rem; color: var(--text-faint, #6b6356); } .ds-article-title { font-family: var(--font-editorial-heading, 'Playfair Display', Georgia, serif); font-size: clamp(1.8rem, 4vw, 2.5rem); font-weight: 700; line-height: 1.3; color: var(--text-heading, #1c1814); margin: 0; } .ds-article-desc { margin-top: 1rem; max-width: 42rem; font-size: 0.875rem; line-height: 1.625; color: var(--text-muted, #5c5548); }

components.name: Template Card (Paper)
components.description: Template showcase card used in post footers or landing sections. Colored top border variant.
components.html:
Paper Template
Editorial reading mode with warm paper background and serif headings.
editorialwarm
components.css: .ds-tpl-card { border-radius: 12px; padding: 1.5rem; border: 1px solid var(--border-color, #e8e0d4); transition: all 0.2s ease; } .ds-tpl-card:hover { transform: translateY(-2px); box-shadow: 0 8px 30px rgba(0,0,0,0.08); } .ds-tpl-paper { background: #fafafa; border-top: 3px solid var(--color-accent-ui, #c2571a); } .ds-tpl-card-title { font-family: var(--font-editorial-heading, 'Playfair Display', Georgia, serif); font-size: 1.1rem; font-weight: 700; margin-bottom: 0.25rem; color: var(--text-heading, #1c1814); } .ds-tpl-card-desc { font-size: 0.85rem; color: var(--text-muted, #5c5548); line-height: 1.5; } .ds-tpl-card-tags { display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 0.35rem; margin-top: 0.75rem; } .ds-tpl-tag { font-size: 0.65rem; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.06em; padding: 0.1rem 0.5rem; border-radius: 9999px; background: rgba(0,0,0,0.05); color: var(--text-muted, #5c5548); }

narrative.overview:
HardStack is a workshop, not a showroom. Every element serves the craft of reading a well-researched technical guide — the visual system exists to get out of the way, then reward attention with precision.

The personality is sharp, minimalist, technical. Text comes first; chrome earns its place. The palette is warm but not sweet — grounded in earthy neutrals and a single burnt-orange accent that reads as heat from the forge, not decoration. Typography pairs a serif editorial heading (Playfair Display) with a clean sans body (Inter), creating a rhythm that says 'take this seriously.'

This system explicitly rejects: generic tech-blog clutter, AI-generated design tells (gradient text, glassmorphism, numbered section markers by default, side-stripe borders), Medium-clone aesthetics, and anything that prioritizes 'looking designed' over readability.
keyCharacteristics: Text-first, chrome-second. Margins and white space are the primary design material.
Bilingual by construction — English and Chinese CJC glyphs coexist in the same layout without friction.
One accent color, used on ≤5% of any given screen. Its rarity is the point.
Flat by default, with subtle elevation on interactive states.
Warm neutrals that feel like a workshop bench, not a coffee shop.

rules.name: The One Ember Rule
rules.body: The burnt-orange accent is used on ≤5% of any given screen. Its rarity is what gives it power. If Ember appears everywhere, it signals nothing.

rules.name: The Warm-But-Not-Sweet Rule
rules.body: Neutrals lean warm (toward ochre, not pink or yellow) to feel material and grounded. They should never read as 'creamy' or 'toasted' — those are coffee-shop adjectives, not workshop adjectives.

rules.name: The 65ch Rule
rules.body: Body text must never exceed 75 characters per line. The prose max-width (880px, ~65ch) is a hard constraint, not a suggestion. Wider text is harder to sustain attention.

dos: Do lead with content. Test every design decision against 'does this make the text easier or harder to read?'
Do use Ember sparingly. It signals interaction and emphasis; overuse dilutes it.
Do respect the 65ch max line length for body text. Use the prose container (880px).
Do use text-wrap: balance on h1–h3 for even line lengths.
Do keep interactive elements pill-shaped (9999px radius).
Do use the glass header for its original purpose — just enough blur to keep navigation legible over scrolling content.
Do write alt text that matches the brand voice: specific, concrete, workshop-grounded.
donts: Don't use side-stripe borders (border-left/right > 1px as colored accent). Rewrite with full borders, background tints, or nothing.
Don't use gradient text (background-clip: text). Single solid colors only.
Don't use glassmorphism decoratively. The header is the only glass element.
Don't reach for numbered section markers (01/02/03) as default scaffolding. Numbers earn their place only when the order carries information.
Don't put tiny uppercase tracked labels above every section. 'Vol. I' on the hero is brand voice; repeating it as section grammar is AI scaffolding.
Don't let heading text overflow its container. Test clamp scales at every breakpoint.
Don't use monospace as a lazy shorthand for 'technical.' Mono is for code.
Don't add cards unless they're the truly best affordance. No nested cards.
Don't animate layout properties. Use transform and opacity.
Don't use identical card grids with icon + heading + text repeated endlessly. Vary content density.
